improvements.summary: Used 0 of 3 tinctures — fitting 3 more on cooldown recovers this

children.summary: Loose GCD pacing — the optimal line fit ~2 more GCDs than you (slightly-late casts spread across the fight, with no single gap)

improvements.summary: GCD uptime & pacing — idle gaps and loose GCD timing. These compound: a dropped or clipped GCD also shoves your next weave and burst window later.
Other — 2 small located losses below the listing threshold, plus small losses scattered across the fight (resource/burst spacing & sequencing)
